title: Naive Bayes Application Workflow for Text Classification
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of applying Naive Bayes to various text classification tasks beyond sentiment analysis.
elements: Input Text (e.g., email, news article, support ticket)
Predicted Class Output (e.g., Spam/Ham, Topic, Intent)
relationships: Raw text is preprocessed into tokens
Processed tokens are converted into numerical features
Features are fed into the trained model
Model calculates posterior probabilities for each class
Class with the highest probability is selected as the final prediction
